Release notes for Pebble Firmware v1.3, detailing new features and improvements.

# Purpose
The release notes document the updates and improvements in version 1.3 of the Pebble E-Paper Watch firmware, known as "Chicken Nugget." This version introduces several new features, including Airplane Mode, which allows users to power down the Bluetooth radio on demand. It also adds PWM support for motor and backlight peripherals, and enhances SMS and email notification support via MAP on iOS 6. Additionally, the release addresses bug fixes for the 2v5 I2C driver, improves iPhone ACP stability, and enhances text rendering performance. The firmware also includes support for entering shipping-mode (standby) through a Bluetooth command.
